name: In Utah, how is fault decided for work injuries?

mainEntity.name: In Utah, how is fault decided for work injuries?

acceptedAnswer.text: No fault for comp; negligence for third-party.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Comp: no fault needed, just work-related; third-party: negligence (duty, breach, causation).[1] Presumption for on-job.[1] Key factors: medical proof for aggravations. Fault irrelevant for employer comp.[1] Focus on causation.

description: No fault for comp; negligence for third-party.[1]
